subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from this servant to the beloved of God whom He hath tried with separation from Him Whom the eyes of existence have never beheld [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا العبد الی احباء الله الذین ابتلیهم الله بفراق الذی ماشهدت
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @presence of; reunion with God
